2605.30080.title: Adaptive Targeted Dynamic Chunking for Tokenization-Free Hierarchical Model
2605.30080.paper_summary: Tokenization-free hierarchical models are emerging as a promising alternative to traditional Large Language Models (LLMs), addressing inherent preprocessing issues such as vocabulary design complexity, out-of-vocabulary (OOV) errors, and language-specific constraints. However, a significant challenge in these byte-level methods is the optimization of the compression ratio, a critical factor that dictates model performance for processing bytes data via chunks. In this paper, we propose Adaptive Targeted Dynamic Chunking (ATDC), a novel byte-compression control mechanism designed to enhance the effectiveness of dynamic chunking within hierarchical architectures. Our approach utilizes curriculum learning to progressively adjust the compression ratio during training, transitioning from low to high compression to stabilize the learning process. We provide an analysis establishing the relationship between the target compression ratio and Bytes-Per-Innermost-Chunk (BPIC), allowing for tracking of chunk-size evolution throughout the training phase. Evaluations conducted on the FineWeb-Edu 100B dataset demonstrate that hierarchical models equipped with ATDC achieve competitive Bits-Per-Byte (BPB) performance compared to conventional baselines operating at both byte and token levels. Furthermore, the proposed method exhibits more stable training dynamics and superior final performance across diverse downstream tasks compared to models using fixed compression ratios, while maintaining the inherent robustness and flexibility of byte-level processing.
2605.30080.paper_summary_zh: 無需標記的層次模型正在成為傳統大型語言模型（LLMs）的有希望替代方案，解決了固有的預處理問題，如詞彙設計的複雜性、超出詞彙（OOV）錯誤和語言特定限制。<lb/>然而，這些位元組級方法的一個重大挑戰是壓縮比的優化，這是一個關鍵因素，決定了通過塊處理位元組數據的模型性能。<lb/>在本文中，我們提出了自適應目標動態分塊（ATDC），這是一種新穎的位元組壓縮控制機制，旨在增強層次架構中動態分塊的有效性。<lb/>我們的方法利用課程學習在訓練過程中逐步調整壓縮比，從低壓縮過渡到高壓縮，以穩定學習過程。<lb/>我們提供了一個分析，確立了目標壓縮比與每最內層塊位元組數（BPIC）之間的關係，允許在訓練階段跟踪塊大小的演變。<lb/>在FineWeb-Edu 100B數據集上進行的評估顯示，配備ATDC的層次模型在位元組和標記級別上相比於傳統基準達到了具有競爭力的每位元組位元數（BPB）性能。<lb/>此外，所提出的方法在各種下游任務中表現出更穩定的訓練動態和更優越的最終性能，相較於使用固定壓縮比的模型，同時保持了位元組級處理的固有穩健性和靈活性。
2605.30080.author: Thang Dang et.al.
2605.30080.authors: Thang Dang, Akira Nakagawa, Kenichi Kobayashi, Koichi Shirahata
